title: Ascension

articleLines.text: After the first ascension.
The ascension screen is accessed by the Legacy button, which is under the Info button. Although you can ascend as early as you want, it will not give any benefit until you have baked enough cookies.

Depending on how many cookies you have baked, you will earn Heavenly Chips and Prestige Levels when ascending (at a 1:1 ratio). Heavenly Chips are used in the Ascension screen to purchase Heavenly Upgrades, which are permanent throughout ascensions and provide various benefits. Each Prestige Level provides a permanent +1% CpS, although the power of your Prestige must first be unlocked in each playthrough by purchasing certain upgrades. Prestige leveling follows a specific cubic pattern, with having Prestige Level 1 needing 1 trillion cookies baked (all time) (1³ x 1 trillion), Prestige Level 2 needing 8 trillion (2³ x 1 trillion) and so on; because of this, going from level 1 to level 2 would require (2³ - 1³) x 1 trillion = an additional 7 trillion cookies.
TL;DR:
Level 1: 1 trillion cookies baked (all time)
Level 2: 8 trillion cookies baked (all time)
Level X: (X^3 * 1 trillion) cookies baked (all time)
See: Heavenly Chips table
Press the "Legacy" button to ascend.

The number beside the 'Legacy' button shows how many Heavenly Chips and Prestige Levels you will earn upon ascending. There are many Achievements associated with ascension. See below for a full list. Also, the Ascension screen allows you to access Challenge Mode. Upon resetting, you will also hear a heavenly sound effect.

Upgrade Tree
These are the heavenly upgrades you can buy. The upgrades you buy here will never be deleted (unless you wipe your save or use Cheating).
Angel & Demon upgrades

The regular upgrades Fortune #102 (1%), Fern tea (3%), and Ichor syrup (7%) also affect offline production. With all upgrades, offline production is 91% for 7 days, 8 hours. During offline cookie production, wrinklers are dormant and CpS is not withered.
For Synergies Vol. I you need at least 227,824 Heavenly chips.
For Synergies Vol. II you need at least 2,718,958 Heavenly chips.
For Chimera you need at least 44,719,651 Heavenly chips.

lines.text: These are the heavenly upgrades you can buy. The upgrades you buy here will never be deleted (unless you wipe your save or use Cheating).

The regular upgrades Fortune #102 (1%), Fern tea (3%), and Ichor syrup (7%) also affect offline production. With all upgrades, offline production is 91% for 7 days, 8 hours. During offline cookie production, wrinklers are dormant and CpS is not withered.

𝑛
cursors
. That comes out as less discount than if it stacked additively, as
𝑛
cursors
